objective: 建立 GFIS CodeGraph residual added 只读 locator，判断 pendingChanges.added=1 是否能映射到 Git 未跟踪且 CodeGraph 可扫描但未入索引的文件。

interpretation.reasoning: All 73 Git-untracked CodeGraph-scannable files are already present in the CodeGraph file index, while sync still reports Added: 1 / 0 nodes and status remains pendingChanges.added=1.

recommended_next_actions: do not delete or stage GFIS untracked files
perform CodeGraph tool-level residual audit if closure is required
consider codegraph unlock or clean reindex only after explicit authorization
keep GFIS CodeGraph sync-only closure false until pendingChanges.added=0

next_round_authorization_question.question: 是否授权执行 GFIS CodeGraph clean reindex audit?
next_round_authorization_question.recommended_answer: 暂不授权 clean reindex，先保留 locator 证据并继续项目群治理收口。
next_round_authorization_question.risk: clean reindex 会重建 .codegraph 本地索引，虽不触碰 Git tracked 文件，但会改变本地索引状态。
